actions.label: 直
actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && nmcli radio wifi on || nmcli radio wifi off'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(nmcli radio wifi) == "enabled" ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.label: Eco
actions.command: busctl set-property net.hadess.PowerProfiles /net/hadess/PowerProfiles net.hadess.PowerProfiles ActiveProfile s "power-saver" && swaync-client --close-panel && sleep 0.15 && swaync-client --open-panel
actions.update-command: sh -c 'busctl get-property net.hadess.PowerProfiles /net/hadess/PowerProfiles net.hadess.PowerProfiles ActiveProfile 2>/dev/null | grep -q '"'power-saver'"' && echo true || echo false'

actions.label: Bal
actions.command: busctl set-property net.hadess.PowerProfiles /net/hadess/PowerProfiles net.hadess.PowerProfiles ActiveProfile s "balanced" && swaync-client --close-panel && sleep 0.15 && swaync-client --open-panel
actions.update-command: sh -c 'busctl get-property net.hadess.PowerProfiles /net/hadess/PowerProfiles net.hadess.PowerProfiles ActiveProfile 2>/dev/null | grep -q '"'balanced'"' && echo true || echo false'

actions.label: Perf
actions.command: busctl set-property net.hadess.PowerProfiles /net/hadess/PowerProfiles net.hadess.PowerProfiles ActiveProfile s "performance" && swaync-client --close-panel && sleep 0.15 && swaync-client --open-panel
actions.update-command: sh -c 'busctl get-property net.hadess.PowerProfiles /net/hadess/PowerProfiles net.hadess.PowerProfiles ActiveProfile 2>/dev/null | grep -q '"'performance'"' && echo true || echo false'
